top_signals.title: Great British Summer Savings 2026: Family activities VAT relief fact sheet
top_signals.summary: From 25 June to 1 September 2026 the Government is introducing a temporary reduced rate of VAT on children's menu meals in restaurants and family leisure activities over the summer period, cutting VAT from 20% to 5%.

top_signals.title: Reeves unveils ‘Great British Summer Savings’ at cost to energy giants
top_signals.summary: Chancellor Rachel Reeves has unveil edthe government’s “Great British Summer Savings” campaign, committing hundreds of millions of pounds to lower costs for families by taxing energy companies more.  Under a new price adjustment set by the government, children aged five to 15 will be able to travel free on participating local bus services across England from [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
